decision_commentary: TC-003 CHECK PASSED: 3 bids collected (meets commercial_hotel SOW requirement of minimum 3). Bid comparison is comprehensive with 10 line items per contractor, hospitality experience assessment, and multi-criteria recommendation. Recommendation for Constructora Baja Sur correctly justified on price (lowest), experience (3 BCS hotel references), and scope completeness. State sync scored 3 per simulated run convention. No auto-fail conditions triggered (comparison matrix present, not a single bid).
